sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n25706" key="diaristeu/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">διᾰριστεύομαι</orth>, <sense id="n25706.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">strive for the pre-eminence,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">πρός τινα</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.4</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
